description: Data sourced via yfinance / Yahoo Finance. HK-listed. Values in HKD billions. Approximation.

observations.note: HK-listed (Hang Seng). yfinance / Yahoo Finance. MC: current market cap (latest) or shares × year-end close (historical). 4-year window. All values in HKD billions. Approximation.
